PRODUCT EVENT SUMMARY: THE DEVICE WAS RETURNED AND ANALYZED. ANALYSIS OF THE RETURNED DEVICE WAS INCONCLUSIVE. HYBRID ANALYSIS CONFIRMED THE NO/INTERMITTENT TELEMETRY. THE DEVICE FUNCTIONED NOMINALLY WITH REGARDS TO BLUETOOTH COMMUNICATION. NO HYBRID ANOMALIES WERE FOUND. THE CAUSE OF THE NO/INTERMITTENT TELEMETRY WAS POTENTIALLY DUE TO A LOW RECEIVED SIGNAL STRENGTH INDICATOR, HOWEVER THE CAUSE OF THE LOW RECEIVED SIGNAL STRENGTH INDICATOR VALUE WAS NOT DETERMINED.
